title: Day 11: Day 11 — The Presentation
content:
# Day 11 — The Presentation

## Topic
How to deliver a recruiting presentation that is clear, compelling, and centered on the agent’s business growth.

## Key Points
1. **Lead with outcomes, not features**: Show how your brokerage helps agents close more deals, earn more, and reduce operational drag.
2. **Make comp easy to understand**: Walk through splits/caps plainly with concrete examples so there’s no confusion.
3. **Sell support, not just commission**: Highlight marketing, coaching, admin help, and accountability systems.
4. **Demonstrate your tech stack in business terms**: Explain how CRM, lead routing, and transaction tools save time and improve conversion.
5. **Use a “day in the life” scenario**: Help them visualize what changes immediately after joining and why it improves their workflow.

## Why It Matters
A great presentation turns interest into commitment. Agents don’t switch brokerages for vague promises—they move when they can clearly see a better path to production, income, and quality of life.
